channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: World Cup 2026: Full group schedule and top second-round matches to watch
item.description: Remaining group schedule, teams, as well as the best second-round group fixtures at the tournament in North America.

item.title: Why do AI models struggle with online hate speech detection?
item.description: As the UN marks International Day for Countering Hate Speech, Al Jazeera examines how AI handles it - and falls short.

item.title: Is the G7 hearing the Global South?
item.description: The G7, BRICS and emerging powers are competing for influence in a changing global order.

item.title: Ukraine hits Moscow refinery as Zelenskyy seeks Trump support to end war
item.description: Russia's Defence Ministry says air defences shot down 555 Ukrainian drones over several regions overnight.

item.title: World Cup predictions: Mexico vs South Korea, Canada vs Qatar and more
item.description: World Cup Day 8 featuring Mexico vs South Korea, Canada vs Qatar and the latest tournament talking points.

item.title: Iran war day 111: Tehran warns US as 14-point plan takes effect
item.description: Iran and the US say a deal to end the conflict is in force, but questions remain over its implementation.

item.title: How Sweden’s far right went from political pariah to powerbroker
item.description: Once shunned by every major party, the Sweden Democrats have gone from political pariah to the heart of government.

item.title: Luis Diaz, Colombia defeat World Cup 2026 debutants Uzbekistan
item.description: The star winger scores a goal and sets up another, as Colombia make a winning return to the FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Despair and delight in England-Croatia grudge match
item.description: Emotions seesawed across London and Zagreb as England met Croatia in a thrilling World Cup grudge match.

item.title: Activist praises Algeria’s support for Gaza orphans following World Cup def
item.description: Activist praises Algeria’s support for Gaza orphans following World Cup defeat

item.title: US must ‘force’ Israel to change its policy on Lebanon
item.description: Rami Khouri says real policy change will only happen when the US forces Israel’s hand in Lebanon.

item.title: Oil prices fall, stocks rally as US, Iran sign framework to end war
item.description: Brent crude drops 2.3 percent, while key stock indices in Japan, South Korea and Taiwan climb.

item.title: Trump’s MoU with Iran draws backlash from some Republicans
item.description: Louisiana Senator Bill Cassidy blasts US-Iran MoU as 'worst foreign policy blunder in decades'.

item.title: Netanyahu under pressure in Israel after US-Iran agreement
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is facing mounting pressure after he was cut out of the US-Iran agreement.

item.title: Who benefits from Zimbabwe’s lithium boom?
item.description: New projects and foreign-backed mines are reshaping Zimbabwe’s lithium sector, with uneven local gains.

item.title: Greta Thunberg joins Brussels protest against Israel
item.description: Around 100 people, including Greta Thunberg and other Flotilla activists, have rallied in Brussels.

item.title: South Africa coach tells critics to ‘shut up’ before second World Cup match
item.description: 'I never listen to the ​trash of the social media,' Hugo Broos says before Bafana Bafana's match against Czechia.

item.title: Ghalibaf says talks delivered more results than war
item.description: Ghalibaf says talks delivered more results than war

item.title: US and Iran sign Memorandum of Understanding to end war
item.description: US President Donald Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian have reportedly signed a Memorandum of Understanding

item.title: Ghana beat Panama 1–0 in chaotic World Cup Group L match
item.description: Caleb Yirenkyi scored a winner in the fifth minute of stoppage time in a scrappy end to the match in Toronto.

item.title: US transfers immigrants out of Florida Alligator Alcatraz detention centre
item.description: The facility, located near the Everglade wetlands, has drawn human rights concerns and lawsuits over its conditions.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel continues Lebanon attacks after US and Iran sign deal
item.description: Tehran insists on an end to Israel's war on Lebanon and full withdrawal for the long-term deal with the US to work.

item.title: Trump to Netanyahu: Use a ‘softer’ touch on Lebanon
item.description: US President Donald Trump has encouraged Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to use a ‘softer touch’ in Lebanon.

item.title: Trump says it’s ‘unfair’ for Iran to lack ballistic missiles
item.description: President Donald Trump says it’s ‘unfair’ for Iran to lack ballistic missiles if other regional countries have them.

item.title: Iran, US presidents sign deal to extend ceasefire, reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Both sides confirm signing a memorandum of understanding that extends their ceasefire by 60 days.
